intent_head: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, and used canonical cast records for birthdays.
function.outcome_justification: Using current date 2026-03-02 from context and birthday entries discovered in 10_entities/cast, the nearest upcoming month-day is 04-04; 10_entities/cast/petra.md confirms the exact name for that birthday is Petra Novak.
